root.sql: select sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no , sc_mem_m_ucf_prename.prename||sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_name||' '||sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_surname as member_name , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_name , '!adt_date!' as adt_date , current_date , sc_mem_m_membership_registered.date_of_birth , sc_mem_m_membership_registered.approve_date , trim(pka_lon_reqsrv.fp_calc_agetext_m_age( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no , '!adt_date!' )) as age_mem , trim(substr(trim(pka_lon_reqsrv.fp_calc_agetext_m_age( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no , '!adt_date!' )),0,2)) as age_mem_year , trim(pka_lon_reqsrv.fp_calc_agetext_m_live( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no , '!adt_date!' )) as age_live , trim(substr(trim(pka_lon_reqsrv.fp_calc_agetext_m_live( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no , '!adt_date!' )),0,3)) as age_live_year , pka_lon_reqsrv.fp_calc_install_m_age( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ) as age_mem_month , (case when trim(substr(trim(pka_lon_reqsrv.fp_calc_agetext_m_age( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no , '!adt_date!' )),0,2)) in ('2','3','4') then 1 when trim(substr(trim(pka_lon_reqsrv.fp_calc_agetext_m_age( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no , '!adt_date!' )),0,2)) in ('5','6','7','8','9') then 2 when trim(substr(trim(pka_lon_reqsrv.fp_calc_agetext_m_age( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no , '!adt_date!' )),0,2)) in ('10','11','12','13','14') then 3 when trim(substr(trim(pka_lon_reqsrv.fp_calc_agetext_m_age( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no , '!adt_date!' )),0,2)) in ('15','16','17','18','19') then 4 else 5 end) as age_mem_range , (case when trim(substr(trim(pka_lon_reqsrv.fp_calc_agetext_m_age( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no , '!adt_date!' )),0,2)) in ('2','3','4') then 'อายุการเป็นสมาชิก 2 ปี แต่ไม่ครบ 5 ปี' when trim(substr(trim(pka_lon_reqsrv.fp_calc_agetext_m_age( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no , '!adt_date!' )),0,2)) in ('5','6','7','8','9') then 'อายุการเป็นสมาชิก 5 ปี แต่ไม่ครบ 10 ปี' when trim(substr(trim(pka_lon_reqsrv.fp_calc_agetext_m_age( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no , '!adt_date!' )),0,2)) in ('10','11','12','13','14') then 'อายุการเป็นสมาชิก 10 ปี แต่ไม่ครบ 15 ปี' when trim(substr(trim(pka_lon_reqsrv.fp_calc_agetext_m_age( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no , '!adt_date!' )),0,2)) in ('15','16','17','18','19') then 'อายุการเป็นสมาชิก 15 ปี แต่ไม่ครบ 20 ปี' else 'อายุการเป็นสมาชิก 20 ปีขึ้นไป' end) as age_mem_range_text from sc_mem_m_membership_registered , sc_mem_m_ucf_prename , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group where sc_mem_m_membership_registered.prename_code = sc_mem_m_ucf_prename.prename_code and sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no and sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_status_code = '0' and sc_mem_m_membership_registered.mem_type = '01' and trim(substr(trim(pka_lon_reqsrv.fp_calc_agetext_m_age( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no , '!adt_date!' )),3,20)) not in ('เดือน',' เดือน',' เดือน') and trim(substr(trim(pka_lon_reqsrv.fp_calc_agetext_m_age( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no , '!adt_date!' )),0,2)) > '1' and trim(substr(trim(pka_lon_reqsrv.fp_calc_agetext_m_live( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no , '!adt_date!' )),0,3)) > '59' /*WHERE*/ order by sc_mem_m_membership_registered.date_of_birth
